name: Framingham

population.sourceName: US Decennial Census 2020, via Wikipedia list of MA municipalities

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: community hospital plus a dense band of outpatient medical offices
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: Leonard Morse Hospital, the other MetroWest campus, is in NATICK — do not attribute it to Framingham. SERVICE REDUCTION 2025: Tenet moved to close the Level IIB special care nursery; verify current maternity status before publishing anything about obstetrics. Route 9 genuinely concentrates medical offices but 'Route 9 medical corridor' is not an established proper name — say 'the medical offices along Route 9'.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
